batches.name: Template/Placeholder Page Fixes + Missing Styles
batches.rationale: All touch different style directories - fully parallel

tasks.title: Fix fluent-2 and organic template pages
tasks.prompt:
In the oh-my-design Next.js project, two style pages are incomplete templates with boilerplate comments. Fix both:

1. app/styles/fluent-2/page.tsx - Implement a complete Microsoft Fluent 2 design system landing page. Use soft gradients, subtle depth, clean typography with Segoe UI feel. Include: design tokens object, Navbar, Hero with fluid animation, Features grid (6 cards), Stats section, CTA, Footer.

2. app/styles/organic/page.tsx - Implement a complete organic/natural design landing page. Use earthy tones (greens, browns, warm whites), flowing shapes, botanical motifs. Include: design tokens, Navbar, Hero with nature animation, Features (6 cards), Testimonials, CTA, Footer.

Both MUST: start with 'use client', import framer-motion, use numeric easing arrays like [0.23, 1, 0.32, 1] (NOT string easings like 'easeOut'), have useReducedMotion() for accessibility. Follow the pattern of existing well-built pages like app/styles/market-mind/page.tsx.

Repo context: branch=main, 142 style pages, Next.js 15.5.14, framer-motion ^12.38.0

tasks.title: Fix professional and retro template pages
tasks.prompt:

2. app/styles/retro/page.tsx - Implement a complete vintage/retro design landing page. Use warm tones, serif fonts, textured backgrounds, halftone patterns. Include: design tokens, Navbar, Hero with retro animation, Features (6 cards), CTA, Footer.

batches.name: Missing Style Implementations + Registry + Claymorphism
batches.rationale: New page creation and registry fixes. Independent directories.

tasks.title: Create industrial and sketch style pages
tasks.prompt:
In the oh-my-design Next.js project, create two new style landing pages:

1. app/styles/industrial/page.tsx - Raw mechanical/factory aesthetic. Concrete grays, rust orange, steel blue, exposed-grid layouts, monospace + bold sans fonts. Include: design tokens, Navbar, Hero with mechanical animation, Features (6 cards), Stats, CTA, Footer.

2. app/styles/sketch/page.tsx - Hand-drawn sketch style. Paper-white background, pencil-stroke borders, hand-drawn feel fonts, wobbly lines via CSS. Include: design tokens, Navbar, Hero with sketch animation, Features (6 cards), CTA, Footer.

Both MUST: start with 'use client', import { motion } from 'framer-motion', use numeric easing arrays like [0.23, 1, 0.32, 1] (NOT string easings), import useReducedMotion. Import icons from lucide-react. Use next/font/google for fonts.

Repo context: branch=main, Next.js 15.5.14, framer-motion ^12.38.0

tasks.title: Create newsprint, material, and humanist-literary style pages
tasks.prompt:
In the oh-my-design Next.js project, create three new style landing pages:

1. app/styles/newsprint/page.tsx - Newspaper/editorial layout. Off-white/cream, black text, column layouts, serif headlines, ruled lines, pull quotes. Include: design tokens, Navbar, Hero, Features in column layout, CTA, Footer.

2. app/styles/material/page.tsx - Google Material Design 3. Material color system, elevation shadows, rounded corners (28px), Roboto font. Include: design tokens, Navbar, Hero, Features (6 elevated cards), FAB-style CTA, Footer.

3. app/styles/humanist-literary/page.tsx - Classical literary/humanist typography. Warm cream/parchment, serifs (Cormorant Garamond or Playfair Display), generous whitespace, drop caps. Include: design tokens, Navbar, Hero, Features (6 cards), Testimonials as book quotes, CTA, Footer.

All MUST: start with 'use client', import framer-motion, use numeric easing arrays like [0.23, 1, 0.32, 1] (NOT string easings), have useReducedMotion(). Import icons from lucide-react.

Repo context: branch=main, Next.js 15.5.14, framer-motion ^12.38.0

tasks.title: Update styles registry with all missing entries and dedup
tasks.prompt:
In the oh-my-design Next.js project, update lib/styles-registry.ts:

1. ADD registry entries for these pages that exist but aren't registered (use appropriate category, vibe, bestFor, accentColor, set built: true):
   - email-elevate, story-scale, type-tango, ad-agency-360 (V3)
   - academia, neo-brutalism, neumorphism, terminal-cli, vaporwave, web3 (V1)
   - claude, clay, clickhouse, cohere, coinbase, resend, revolut, runwayml, sanity, sentry (V2)

2. DEDUPLICATE these pairs (keep the FIRST/kebab-case version, REMOVE the duplicate):
   - Keep fan-cave, remove fancave
   - Keep bot-stream, remove botstream
   - Keep logic-gate, remove logicgate
   - Keep code-flow, remove codeflow
   - Keep prompt-palace, remove promptpalace
   - Keep drill-master, remove drillmaster

3. Ensure market-mind has built: true
4. Do NOT change the StyleMeta interface or exports structure.

Repo context: branch=main

tasks.title: Fix claymorphism broken import
tasks.prompt:
In the oh-my-design Next.js project, fix app/styles/claymorphism/page.tsx which has a broken import on line 8:

import { AnimatedSection, AnimatedButton, AnimatedCard, AnimatedFAQ, AnimatedNewsletterForm, BackgroundBlobs } from './motion-wrappers'

The file ./motion-wrappers does NOT exist. Fix by:
1. Remove the broken import
2. Inline simple motion wrapper components at the top of the file:
   - AnimatedSection: motion.section with fade-in on scroll
   - AnimatedButton: motion.button with hover/tap scale
   - AnimatedCard: motion.div with stagger animation
   - AnimatedFAQ: motion.div with expand/collapse via AnimatePresence
   - BackgroundBlobs: animated floating decorative blobs
3. Use numeric easing arrays like [0.23, 1, 0.32, 1] (NOT string easings)
4. Keep 'use client' at top, import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'

Repo context: branch=main, Next.js 15.5.14, framer-motion ^12.38.0

batches.name: Framer-Motion String Easing Fixes
batches.rationale: Mechanical find-and-replace across many files. Split into 4 tasks of ~18 files each.

tasks.title: Fix string easings batch A (worst offenders)
tasks.prompt:
In the oh-my-design Next.js project, fix framer-motion string easing values. Replace ALL string easings with numeric cubic-bezier arrays:

- ease: "easeOut" → ease: [0.23, 1, 0.32, 1]
- ease: "easeInOut" → ease: [0.42, 0, 0.58, 1]
- ease: "easeIn" → ease: [0.42, 0, 1, 1]
- ease: "linear" → ease: [0, 0, 1, 1]

Fix these files:
1. app/styles/bauhaus/page.tsx (11 instances)
2. app/styles/pet-memorial/page.tsx (10 instances)
3. app/styles/kibblecloud/page.tsx (9 instances)
4. app/styles/vetflow/page.tsx (7 instances)
5. app/styles/featherflow/page.tsx (5 instances)
6. app/styles/rescuerhythm/page.tsx (5 instances)
7. app/styles/pawsitive-tech/page.tsx (4 instances)
8. app/styles/golfers-edge/page.tsx (4 instances)
9. app/styles/petzen/page.tsx (4 instances)
10. app/styles/fishtank/page.tsx (4 instances)
11. app/styles/whiskerwatch/page.tsx (3 instances)
12. app/styles/reptileroom/page.tsx (3 instances)
13. app/styles/deep-draw/page.tsx (3 instances)
14. app/styles/fancave/page.tsx (3 instances)
15. app/styles/groomglide/page.tsx (3 instances)
16. app/styles/pitchvision/page.tsx (3 instances)
17. app/styles/pet-shop-hero/page.tsx (3 instances)

IMPORTANT: Only change easing values. Do NOT modify any other code.
